paper_title: Factors inhibiting teachers from research engagement: A review

entities.description: The primary field of study concerning teaching practices and teacher development.

entities.id: School of Foreign Languages, Can Tho University
entities.description: The educational institution located in Vietnam.
The involvement of teachers in doing research as well as reading and using research.
The process of improving and increasing capabilities of staff through access to education and training.
A factor inhibiting research engagement due to lack of support or collaboration.
The systematic review of existing literature on language teachers' research engagement.
A method used to investigate changes in practice through systematic inquiry.
A study conducted with teachers across 13 countries regarding research inhibiting reasons.
Data collected from 505 teachers in 13 countries.
The number of participants in the cited study by Borg (2009).
The minimum time requirement for lecturers to spend on research as per Circular 47/2014/TT-BGDDT.
The number of teachers claiming they need advice but none is available in the Borg (2009) study.
